parameters.jsCode:
return $input.all().map(input => { const d = input.json; const htmlBody = `
StockSense
Urgent Procurement Request

Dear ${d.company_name} Team,

We are reaching out to place an urgent restocking order for one of the products we source through your company. Our demand forecasting system has flagged this product as high priority for the upcoming period.

Stockout risk detected — immediate action required to avoid supply gap.

Product Details

Product ID${d.product.product_id}
Category${d.product.category}
Region${d.product.region}
Predicted demand${d.product.predicted_demand} units
Forecast confidence${d.product.confidence}

Order Request

Requested quantity${d.order.requested_quantity} units
Unit priceMYR ${d.order.unit_price_myr}
Estimated lead time${d.order.lead_time_days} days
Payment terms${d.order.payment_terms}

Please confirm availability and the earliest possible delivery date. Given the critical stockout risk, any acceleration of the standard lead time would be greatly appreciated.

Reply directly to this email to confirm the order or to discuss adjustments.

StockSense Procurement Team

Automated Supply Chain Intelligence

`.trim(); return { json: { ...d, product_id: d.product.product_id, category: d.product.category, region: d.product.region, predicted_demand: d.product.predicted_demand, stockout_risk: d.product.stockout_risk, email_subject: d.subject, email_body: htmlBody, email_priority: d.priority } }; });

json.confidence_reason: Moderate data points with some volatility in historical demand.
json.key_drivers: Winter season, Competitive pricing
json.action_detail: Inventory is sufficient to cover the slightly increasing demand.

json.confidence_reason: High promotion rate hasn't stopped the decreasing trend.
json.key_drivers: Decreasing trend, High promotion rate
json.action_detail: Demand is declining despite promotions, so reducing inventory will prevent overstock.

json.confidence_reason: Heavy promotions indicate an effort to counteract the declining demand.
json.key_drivers: Decreasing trend, Heavy promotions
json.action_detail: Inventory is high and demand is decreasing, so reducing stock is advised.

json.confidence_reason: High volatility indicated by large spread between max and min demand.
json.key_drivers: Increasing trend, Competitive pricing
json.action_detail: Current inventory levels can comfortably handle the projected increase in demand.

json.confidence_reason: Higher price than competitors may cap the increasing demand trend.

json.action_detail: High inventory combined with a decreasing demand trend calls for inventory reduction.

json.confidence_reason: High volatility and stable trend make exact demand somewhat unpredictable despite promotions.
